app.script:
df <- subset(get.input(), !is.na(length_m))
df$sqrt_length_m <- sqrt(df$length_m)
df$period_mean_s <- rowMeans(df[c("period_1_s", "period_2_s", "period_3_s")], na.rm = TRUE)
df$period_sd_s <- apply(df[c("period_1_s", "period_2_s", "period_3_s")], 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
fit <- lm(period_mean_s ~ sqrt_length_m, data = df)
set.paper_style(mar = c(4.2, 4.2, 2.1, 0.8))
plot(df$sqrt_length_m, df$period_mean_s,
  pch = 19, col = "firebrick", cex = 1.15,
  xlab = "sqrt(length) / m^0.5", ylab = "Mean period / s",
  main = "Simple pendulum: period vs sqrt(length)"
)
add.paper_guides(show_top_axis = TRUE, show_right_axis = TRUE)
arrows(df$sqrt_length_m, df$period_mean_s - df$period_sd_s,
  df$sqrt_length_m, df$period_mean_s + df$period_sd_s,
  angle = 90, code = 3, length = 0.04
)
abline(fit, col = "#374151", lwd = 2)
print(df[c("length_m", "period_mean_s", "period_sd_s")])
summary(fit)

runtimeStatus.text: サンプルを読み込みました
